posts.author: Ruchi_Porwal
posts.text: Secondary demat account at Zerodha to manage your investments — It seems like you are stuck at the authorisation stage. When transferring stocks back from the secondary account to primary, you’ll have to use a separate TPIN, which is different from what you would have used during the primary to secondary transfer. Whenever your secondary account is activated, you will receive the TPIN for your secondary demat account via email. You can also generate the TPIN by entering the BO ID for your secondary account. Our support team will get in touch with you to discuss the issues you faced while makin…

posts.author: Ruchi_Porwal
posts.text: Secondary demat account at Zerodha to manage your investments — Hi, we’re sorry to hear this. The previous status should have updated correctly. This appears to be an issue where an error response may have resulted in duplicate entries being created in the history section. If you could share the complete ticket details or DM your user ID, we’ll verify the logs and check what went wrong in your case.

posts.text: Secondary demat account at Zerodha to manage your investments — I am writing to formally raise a serious complaint regarding multiple discrepancies in my portfolio, P&L statement, and Tax P&L statement after availing your Secondary Demat Account facility.
